title: phyllostegia pilosa
intro: Phyllostegia pilosa, also known as Hawaiian lilac or Hawaiian plume flower, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use by making a tea from the leaves or infusing the flowers in water to create a herbal preparation.
